s2.ptxt: Remove the rear combination light gasket.

item.ptxt: Be sure to remove the all traces of the old gasket from the body.
Do not reuse the removed gasket. Be sure to install a new rear combination light gasket to prevent water ingress.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE TAIL AND STOP LIGHT BULB

s2.ptxt: Turn the tail and stop light bulb and the rear combination light socket in the direction indicated by the arrow and disconnect them as a unit.
Remove the tail and stop light bulb from the tail and stop light socket.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR TURN SIGNAL LIGHT BULB

s2.ptxt: Turn the rear turn signal light bulb and the rear light socket and wire in the direction indicated by the arrow and disconnect them as a unit.
Remove the rear turn signal light bulb from the rear light socket and wire.
Disengage the claw and remove the rear bumper retainer upper.
Turn the back up light bulb and the rear light socket and wire in the direction indicated by the arrow and remove them as a unit.
Remove the back up light bulb from the rear light socket and wire.
Turn the tail light bulb and the rear light socket and wire in the direction indicated by the arrow and remove them as a unit.
Remove the tail light bulb from the rear light socket and wire.

item.ptxt: Be sure to remove all traces of the old gasket from the body.
Do not reuse the removed gasket. Be sure to install a new rear light gasket to prevent water ingress.
